financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well overall, but some profits are being squeezed by extra costs from tariffs.
They are making smart moves to improve their financial health by raising money and reducing debt.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but new U.S. tariffs have temporarily hurt profits.
Big projects are on track, but any unexpected issues could affect the company's finances.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing well in taking care of the environment and managing its leadership.
Overall, the company has room to improve in being responsible and ethical.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke with confidence about their strong financial results and future plans.
They were optimistic about growing the business and successfully completing important projects.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company gave clear answers about daily operations but was unclear about future plans and money matters.
They need to be more open about their strategies and financial decisions to improve trust.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing very well, especially in its airport and new business areas, making the leaders very confident.
Even though there are some challenges, the company plans to use its completed projects to keep growing in the future.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company has completed big projects like an airport and a plant, which should help it make more money in the future.
Even though there are some global issues affecting trade, the company is still doing well financially and plans to raise more money to grow further.
